env.note: If old RD_SUB fixtures conflict with project attribution, clear and reinject only in local/test, then record the exact reset scope in the acceptance run.

cases.title: RD handoff persistence requires rd-project attribution and is visible in inbound results
preconditions: Login with an account that can create RD handoff documents through API and view inbound results in web
At least one active RD project exists
MAIN has a material available for handoff into RD_SUB
steps: Call the RD handoff create API with a procurement-request-backed line whose source request lacks a resolvable RD project, and verify the request is rejected
Create a valid handoff through API where every line can resolve to an effective RD project
Open the inbound results page and locate the created handoff
Open the detail drawer and review every effective line
expected: The write path does not allow a handoff line to persist without project attribution
The saved handoff result shows project attribution on every effective line

cases.title: Monthly reporting explains the same handoff by viewpoint
preconditions: Use a coherent fixture set aligned to the new RD_SUB attribution model
At least one handoff and one downstream RD project action exist in the selected month
steps: Open monthly reporting for the target month
Review the MAIN or overall warehouse view for the handoff amount
Review the RD or RD project view for the same attributed handoff
Open drilldown details for the related handoff and project totals
expected: The same handoff can be interpreted as internal transfer, project inbound, or project activity depending on viewpoint
Drilldowns remain traceable and do not rely on guessed project attribution

cases.title: RD project and RD_SUB scoped views stay aligned after reversal or stock adjustment
preconditions: Prepare an attributed RD handoff fixture
Prepare a scoped RD_SUB user if the permission flow needs coverage
steps: Open the attributed handoff, then perform a reversal or open a stocktake or adjustment flow
Verify the affected material remains project-attributed after the operation
Review RD project ledger and RD_SUB scoped views for the same material
expected: Reversal or adjustment does not produce long-lived unattributed RD_SUB stock
RD project ledger and RD_SUB scoped views remain explainable from the same fact chain
